title: SEIU Local 509 — News (Listing Snapshot)
description: Scraped Markdown of the SEIU Local 509 'News' listing page, a snapshot of recent union news posts from January through May 2026. Headlines include AAPI Heritage Month, the Lesley University core-faculty strike-authorization vote, a statement on Tewksbury State Hospital incidents, April 2026 quarterly nominations, the 2026 Scholarship Program opening, Lobby Day, GIC (Group Insurance Commission) healthcare-cost advocacy updates, and the Tufts SMFA first-contract ratification. Includes media-inquiries contact info. Authoritative snapshot of Local 509 communications and campaigns.
notes: Authoritative: official SEIU Local 509 union content scraped from seiu509.org. This is a point-in-time listing snapshot; the live page is continuously updated, so the captured posts (dated Jan 30 - May 4, 2026) reflect only the scrape moment and will drift from the live site. temporal_coverage bounds the captured post dates. Each entry links to a full article on seiu509.org not included in this repo. Leading lines are cookie-consent chrome; trailing block is the gtranslate switcher.
